commands: aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-2 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com

nohup bash -c 'docker build --progress=plain --build-arg BASE_IMAGE=<AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/base-cuda-efa:v2 -t <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/mooncake-nixl:v1 -f Dockerfile . 2>&1 | tee build.log; docker tag <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/mooncake-nixl:v1 <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/mooncake-nixl:latest 2>&1; docker push <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/mooncake-nixl:v1 2>&1 | tee push.log; docker push <AWS_ACCOUNT_ID>.dkr.ecr.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/efa-validation/mooncake-nixl:latest 2>&1 | tee -a push.log' > build-orchestrator.log 2>&1 &
ps -ef | grep 'docker build' | grep -v grep | head -3
